---
pagetitle: "Research · Sushovan Majhi"
title: ""
toc: false
listing:
  - id: projects
    contents:
      - projects/*.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    sort: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
    image-height: 200px
---

```{=html}
<header class="masthead page">
  <div class="kicker">Sushovan Majhi</div>
  <div class="pub-title">Research</div>
  <div class="edition">
    <span>Applied Topology &middot; Computational Geometry &middot; TDA</span>
    <span>Six active projects</span>
  </div>
</header>
```

My research lies at the interface of *mathematics* and *computer science*, with a focus on the mathematical foundations of data science. More specifically, I am interested in *applied topology*, *computational geometry*, and *topological data analysis*.

The theoretical side of my research concerns developing inference techniques for data science that are inspired by topological and geometric methods. As a topological data analyst, I am also motivated to solve practical problems arising in fields such as finance, physics, biology, and medicine.

## Active Projects
Click a card to read about each project, its collaborators, and the papers it has produced.

:::{#projects}
:::

## Publications
For the full list of publications, see the [publications](publications/) page.
